## Library: IMMZAgeConcepts 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZAgeConcepts | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-04-12 | *Computable Name*:IMMZAgeConcepts |

 
This library defines concepts for ages and age ranges used throughout the Immunization CPG
